meta.title: DEFCON ALPHA — Operator Manual
meta.description: Professional reference manual on modern warfare. NATO doctrine, Ukraine 2022–2026 lessons learned, fundamentals for volunteers and operational personnel.

hero.title: Operator Manual
hero.subtitle: Professional reference on modern warfare. Built on NATO doctrine, Ukraine 2022–2026 lessons learned, and the operational practice of international volunteer units.

scope.title: Scope
scope.body: This is a professional educational reference. Not propaganda, not a civilian guide, not a simplified course. A technical text written for the international volunteer interfacing with modern operational structures — with focus on the Ukrainian front and the experience of Defcon Alpha.
items: NATO conventional doctrine and post-Soviet doctrinal variation
Armament encyclopaedia at doctrinal level (no operational or construction instruction)

levels.title: Manual structure
levels.subtitle: Four levels plus dedicated encyclopaedic sections.

level1.label: LEVEL I
level1.title: Foundation
level1.body: Professional mindset, military structure, NATO ranks, OPSEC, phonetic alphabet, MGRS, symbology, base terminology.

level2.label: LEVEL II
level2.title: Infantry & Fieldcraft
level2.body: Tactical movement, camouflage, patrolling, urban and trench warfare, CQB fundamentals, OPs, night combat.

level3.label: LEVEL III
level3.title: Modern Warfare
level3.body: FPV drones, EW, SIGINT, artillery survival, comms discipline, battlefield awareness, modern kill chain.

level4.label: LEVEL IV
level4.title: Operator Mindset
level4.body: Decision making under stress, small-unit leadership, cold blood, resilience, cohesion, AAR, mission planning.

weapons.label: SECTION V
weapons.title: Armaments
weapons.body: Encyclopaedic reference: AK/AR platforms, PKM, SVD, RPG, ATGM, MANPADS, mortars, optics, thermals, NVG, radios.

comms.label: SECTION VI
comms.title: Communications
comms.body: NATO brevity, callsigns, contact report, SITREP, SALUTE, 9-line MEDEVAC, prowords, authentication.

linguistic.label: SECTION VII
linguistic.title: Multilingual glossary
linguistic.body: Parallel operator terminology in Italian, English, Brazilian Portuguese and French.

osint.label: § OSINT
osint.title: Public references — militaryland.net
osint.subtitle: Material publicly indexed by militaryland.net on the 2nd Special Operations Detachment "KORD" (HUR). Already in the public domain; republished here for educational reference with explicit source attribution.
osint.note: SOURCE: MILITARYLAND.NET / 2ND SPECIAL OPERATIONS DETACHMENT KORD — HUR. PUBLIC INDEXED OSINT CONTENT. EXIF/GPS METADATA STRIPPED AT PUBLICATION.

disclaimer.title: Document limits
disclaimer.body: This manual contains no illegal instructions, no terrorist procedures, no construction details for weapons or explosives, and no criminal tactics. It is a formative text oriented to understanding, communication, discipline and professional organisation.

footer.credit: Educational document. Not recruitment, operational training nor incitement.

foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.intro: Turning a complete beginner into someone able to understand the modern military world: mindset, structure, terminology, information security, base cartography and communications.

infantry.title: Infantry & Fieldcraft
infantry.intro: Modern infantry training. Movement, camouflage, patrolling, urban and trench environments, CQB fundamentals, OPs, recon, anti-drone awareness.

modern-warfare.title: Modern Warfare
modern-warfare.intro: Modern Ukrainian war: FPV drones, EW, SIGINT, artillery survival, communications discipline, battlefield OSINT, contemporary kill chain.

operator-mindset.title: Professional Operator Mindset
operator-mindset.intro: Decision making under stress, small-unit leadership, mental discipline, resilience, cohesion, after-action review, professional conduct.

weapons.title: Armaments
weapons.intro: Encyclopaedic section: role, nomenclature, terminology, variants, general tactical employment and distribution in Ukraine. No operational or construction instruction.

comms.title: Communications
comms.intro: NATO brevity, authentication, callsigns, report formats, MEDEVAC terminology, prowords, realistic radio traffic examples.

linguistic.title: Multilingual glossary
linguistic.intro: Parallel operator terminology: infantry, radio, drones, medical, intelligence, urban, artillery — IT / EN / PT-BR / FR.
